title: Oud Bergamot Scented Candle Gift,Citrus Jar Candles Vegan Clean Burning 36 Hrs,Mandarin and Bergamot Candle for Christmas, Aromatherapy Candles for Healing,Vegan Candle Oud Wood Smell Xmas Gift
features: 【OUD BERGAMOT SCENTED CANDLE GIFT】After opening the candle jar,the smell of oud bergamot & cardamom & vanilla lasting in the living room when you light this highly aromatherapy tea Lights scented candle.The 160g soy wax with cedar aroma will last 36 hours burning.

【NATURAL SOY WAX JAR CANDLE】The aroma tunes of TOP MID and BASE are oudwood bergamot & cardamom patchouli & cedar vanilla extract from all natural plant essential oil.The healing candle will relax your body and soul.Meanwhile,the luxury candle jar design will decorate your home.

【AROMATHERAPY CANDLE WITH COTTON WICK】The cotton wick of woody scent candle will help the aroma expand softly and heat wax uniformly.The agarwood candle with wooden lid showing your premium taste.It is a long burning candle with no messy residue.

【VANILLA CANDLE FOR MORE OCCASIONS】The cardamom patchouli scent candle will refresh your body,it is good for reading yoga or chatting in patio or balcony.It is also friendly for your family and pets.This mandarin and bergamot candle is also good scented tea light for British afternoon tea time.

【THE PERFECT TABLE CENTREPIECE】Elegantly packaged candle with premium aroma will be a wonderful gift set for women or men friend,lovers,family as birthday gifts,table decoration gifts,indoor air freshener or wedding gifts.This soy wax candle gift is suitable for office,party,anniversaries day,Christmas,Thanksgiving Day,house warming,thank you teacher and retirement.
